title: Regression Run Result
description: Governed artifact produced by the BR Replay Regression Harness after executing a full regression suite. Records per-trace outcomes and aggregate statistics.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this regression run.

suite_id.description: Identifier of the suite manifest that was executed.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this run result was created.

total_traces.description: Total number of traces in the suite.

passed_traces.description: Number of traces whose replay analysis passed all criteria.

failed_traces.description: Number of traces whose replay analysis failed at least one criterion.

pass_rate.description: Fraction of traces that passed: passed_traces / total_traces.

overall_status.description: Overall suite status. 'pass' only when all traces pass; 'fail' if any trace fails.

decision_status.description: Decision consistency status from the replay analysis.

reproducibility_score.description: Reproducibility score from the replay analysis.

drift_type.description: Drift classification from the analysis. Empty string when no drift was detected.

passed.description: Whether this trace passed all regression criteria.

failure_reasons.description: Human-readable reasons for failure. Empty when passed=true.

summary.description: Aggregate statistics across all traces in the suite.

drift_counts.description: Count of each drift type observed across all traces.

average_reproducibility_score.description: Mean reproducibility score across all traces.
